channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Decathlon brade l’un de ses meilleurs VTT électriques avec 500 € de réduction et offre 175 euros en carte cadeau
item.description: Le Rockrider E-EXPL 700 est un vélo tout-terrain à assistance électrique qui va vous suivre dans toutes vos aventures, à retrouver pour 1 999,99 euros au lieu de 2 499,99 euros sur Decathlon.

item.title: This budget-friendly Acer Nitro V boasts an RTX 4050 and Intel Core i5 for $699.99
item.description: The Acer Nitro V is a great budget gaming laptop, and this RTX 4050 version is now even cheaper than usual at Amazon.

item.title: Let it snow
item.description: Water gets all the credit. When gaming companies want to show off new graphics technology, things tend to get wet; splashing waves that are only possible with the latest physics engine, or puddles that can reflect the world around them thanks to ray tracing. But there's something special about snow. It might not be as […]

item.title: What is the release date for Off Campus on Prime Video?
item.description: The hit Elle Kennedy books series is finally getting its small screen adaptation. But when does Off Campus drop on Prime Video?

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again season 3 — everything we know so far about the Marvel TV show's return on Disney+
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again season 3 will be released sometime in 2027 — here's everything we know ahead of its eventual release.

item.title: Mortal Kombat II review: More than just camp
item.description: It's the best Mortal Kombat film yet.

item.title: The game that makes me actually want to exercise
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 127, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, my Scorpion challenges your Sub-Zero to a duel, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Hasan Piker and lines and […]

item.title: Quantum dot TVs beat RGB LED TVs, says the company that makes QDs for TVs
item.description: At the Los Angeles Convention Center, two 85-inch TVs sat side by side inside the Nanosys meeting room at Display Week - a yearly business-to-business convention focusing on the technology that goes into displays of all types. One TV was a mini-LED panel with super quantum dots, and the other was an RGB LED - […]

item.title: Un look de Defender pour 11 000 € : on est monté à bord du Chery Fulwin X3 Plus en Chine, un SUV électrique qui pourrait bien arriver en Europe
item.description: Si le géant chinois Chery propose uniquement sa marque Omoda Jaecoo en France, il dispose d'une véritable galaxie en Chine. Parmi elles, iCar (parfois rebaptisée Fulwin) propose des SUV électriques qui sortent de l'ordinaire. Nous sommes partis à la découverte du Chery Fulwin X3 Plus (ou iCar 03) pour mieux comprendre cette marque qui pourrait finir par arriver en Europe. ...

item.title: With a $1.3 trillion lifetime bill, America’s iconic B-52 Stratofortress 'BUFF' bomber, which is as old as Vladimir Putin, gets new avionics and upgraded engines to help it reach a century of service
item.description: The B-52 engine upgrade aims to extend service life, despite rising costs, delays, and ongoing challenges tied to aging aircraft systems

item.title: The EU becomes the latest authority to signal that VPNs are next, after launching its age verification app — here's how VPNs went from a necessity security tool to circumvention software that needs to be restricted
item.description: As the internet gets age-gated, users turn to VPN apps in a bid to circumvent mandatory checks. The EU is now the last to turn its attention towards this tech — and cybersecurity experts are worried.

item.title: I use Google Keep every day — and this leaked upgrade is badly needed. Here's why
item.description: There's already a lot to like about Google Keep, and the ability to add notes from the Android lock screen is rumored to be on the way.

item.title: Chainsaw carnage, lots of music-based titles and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Plus, make a mixtape with help from the folks behind Mixtape.
